languages.text: "Я уверен, в лабораториях Магос Биологис отыщется все необходимое для экспериментальной проверки ".
"I am confident that the laboratories of the Magos Biologis can provide all that is necessary for an empirical investigation."
languages.original_text: "Я уверен, в лабораториях Магос Биологис отыщется все необходимое для экспериментальной проверки ".

traits.locale_text: "I am confident that the laboratories of the Magos Biologis can provide all that is necessary for an empirical investigation."
"I am confident that the laboratories of the Magos Biologis can provide all that is necessary for an empirical investigation."
"I am confident that the laboratories of the Magos Biologis can provide all that is necessary for an empirical investigation."
"I am confident that the laboratories of the Magos Biologis can provide all that is necessary for an empirical investigation."

languages.text: "Ich bin zuversichtlich, dass wir in den Laboratorien des Magos Biologis alles finden, was wir für eine empirische Untersuchung nötig brauchen."
languages.original_text: "I am confident that the laboratories of the Magos Biologis can provide all that is necessary for an empirical investigation."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin zuversichtlich, dass wir in den Laboratorien des Magos Biologis alles finden, was wir für eine empirische Untersuchung nötig brauchen."

languages.text: « À mon avis, les laboratoires du Magos Biologis peuvent nous fournir tout le nécessaire pour mener des recherches empiriques dignes de ce nom. »
languages.original_text: "I am confident that the laboratories of the Magos Biologis can provide all that is necessary for an empirical investigation."

traits.locale_text: « À mon avis, les laboratoires du Magos Biologis peuvent nous fournir tout le nécessaire pour mener des recherches empiriques dignes de ce nom. »

languages.text: «No me cabe duda de que los laboratorios de los Magos Biologis podrán proporcionar todo lo necesario para una investigación empírica».
languages.original_text: "I am confident that the laboratories of the Magos Biologis can provide all that is necessary for an empirical investigation."

traits.locale_text: «No me cabe duda de que los laboratorios de los Magos Biologis podrán proporcionar todo lo necesario para una investigación empírica».

languages.text: "Eminim Magos Biyologis'in laboratuvarları, görgül bir araştırma için gereken her şeyi sağlayabilir."
languages.original_text: "I am confident that the laboratories of the Magos Biologis can provide all that is necessary for an empirical investigation."

traits.locale_text: "Eminim Magos Biyologis'in laboratuvarları, görgül bir araştırma için gereken her şeyi sağlayabilir."

languages.text: “我相信生物贤者的实验室能提供开展实证研究所需的一切。”
languages.original_text: "I am confident that the laboratories of the Magos Biologis can provide all that is necessary for an empirical investigation."

traits.locale_text: “我相信生物贤者的实验室能提供开展实证研究所需的一切。”
